title: phacelia pringlei var. orogenes
intro: Phacelia pringlei var. orogenes, also known as a variety of the Pringle's phacelia, is a plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Phacelia pringlei var. orogenes, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
